title: Wire project memory updates into lifecycle commands
description: The repo can now write tasks, goals, and the recent confirmation window through dedicated commands, and the main lifecycle command set covered by v1.9 now updates those artifacts automatically enough to support the self-hosting runtime claim.
triage_notes: v1.9.0 released with lifecycle-native sync for run, answer, outcome-report, signal, escalation-resolve, and approval-stage council-exec. Remaining gaps move to the next task: stronger alignment-pulse/task-triage cadence and any further execution-stage coverage.
